name: Inngest
description: Event-driven workflow platform. Monitor function deployment and event access.

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to your Inngest Cloud dashboard
2. Go to Profile menu (bottom left) > API Keys
3. Create a new API key (or use your environment signing key)
4. Enter it below

checks.name: Inngest App Availability
checks.description: Checks that the Inngest API is accessible.

checks.name: Inngest Employee Access
checks.description: Verifies employee access to Inngest via API.
